The '''Gorgano IV Museum''' was located in the [[Historical District]] of [[Estalle Island]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. It was of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] most prestigious art [[Museum/Legends|museums]] and regularly sponsored exhibitions of established and upcoming artists. It was named after a former Emperor, [[Gorgano IV]]. The museum's collection of art was extremely valuable and the institution had an excellent security system to deter and prevent would-be thieves.
